text:
Ed, I'm going to provide more info about this issue
(currently far away from console, xmas vacations..).

Yes. It's unmodified vendor aacu driver @ IBM ServeRAID 8k
at brand new x3650. From arcconf:

   --------------------------------------------------------
   Controller Version Information
   --------------------------------------------------------
   BIOS                                     : 5.2-0 (15421)
   Firmware                                 : 5.2-0 (15421)
   Driver                                   : 2.1-15 (15753)
   Boot Flash                               : 5.1-0 (15411)
   --------------------------------------------------------


-- 
wbr,
pluknet
